examples.exam_en: The teacher helped students focus on key ideas.
examples.exam_ko: 선생님은 학생들이 핵심 개념에 집중하도록 도왔다.

examples.exam_en: She struggled to focus during the loud meeting.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 시끄러운 회의 중에 집중하기 어려웠다.

examples.exam_en: The peach felt firm and fresh at the market.
She gave a firm answer and did not change it.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 단호한 답변을 하고 바꾸지 않았다.

examples.exam_en: Many fireworks lit up the sky on New Year's Eve.
examples.exam_ko: 새해 전날 밤 많은 불꽃놀이가 하늘을 밝혔다.

examples.exam_en: The children watched fireworks burst over the river.
examples.exam_ko: 아이들은 강 위에서 터지는 불꽃놀이를 바라봤다.

examples.exam_en: The colors in the old photo began to fade quickly.
examples.exam_ko: 오래된 사진의 색이 빠르게 흐려지기 시작했다.

examples.exam_en: His excitement soon faded after the bad news.
examples.exam_ko: 나쁜 소식 후 그의 흥분은 곧 사그라들었다.

examples.exam_en: I'm extremely sorry for the misunderstanding.
Cost was the main factor in their decision.
Wealth was the chief factor in his success.
The hotel charged an extra fee for late checkout.
examples.exam_ko: 호텔은 늦은 체크아웃에 추가 요금을 부과했다.

examples.exam_en: She received extra pay for working overtime.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 초과 근무로 추가 수당을 받았다.

examples.exam_en: The evolution of the novel took centuries.
The evolution of computer technology has been rapid.
examples.exam_ko: 컴퓨터 기술의 발달은 매우 빠르게 이루어졌다.

examples.exam_en: The mistake was evident to everyone in the room.
examples.exam_ko: 그 실수는 방 안의 모든 사람에게 분명했다.

examples.exam_en: Her talent was evident from an early age.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀의 재능은 어릴 때부터 분명하게 드러났다.

examples.exam_en: The detective found reliable evidence at the scene.
The lawyer presented strong evidence in court.
They divided the money evenly among the group.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 돈을 그룹 내에서 균등하게 나눴다.

examples.exam_en: The two teams are evenly matched in skill.
examples.exam_ko: 두 팀은 실력이 대등하게 맞붙어 있다.

examples.exam_en: The suspect managed to evade capture for days.
examples.exam_ko: 그 용의자는 며칠간 체포를 피하는 데 성공했다.

examples.exam_en: He tried to evade the reporter's direct question.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 기자의 직접적인 질문을 회피하려 했다.

examples.exam_en: Firefighters ordered everyone to evacuate the building.
Children were evacuated from cities to the countryside.
She tried to estimate the cost of the trip.
I estimated the damage at five million dollars.
The establishment of a new university took years.
The two countries celebrated the establishment of diplomatic relations.
examples.exam_ko: 두 나라는 외교 관계의 수립을 축하했다.

examples.exam_en: The VIP was provided with a security escort.
examples.exam_ko: 그 중요 인물은 경호 호위를 받았다.

examples.exam_en: The queen was escorted by soldiers everywhere.
Both sides feared the conflict would escalate into war.
The cost of living is escalating every year.
She was eager to start her new job.
He is eager in his studies every day.
The durability of concrete depends on its grade.
The payment is due by the end of the month.
The loan became due after one year.
